_style_baseline: top-down 2D game sprite, chibi proportions, dark sci-fi space station aesthetic, teal and dark blue palette, high contrast, clean edges, game-ready asset, no text, no watermarks, single character centered in frame

map.station_map_full: top-down bird's eye view of a complete sci-fi space station interior, dark metal corridors connecting 5 distinct rooms with teal ambient lighting, rooms include command bridge at top, engineering bay bottom-left, research lab center, life support right, comms array top-right, detailed floor panels and equipment, 3D-rendered look with depth and shadows, 2048x2048px game map, no text labels, dark space visible outside station walls
